description: Test: SelectionSauvegarde 'Continue' correctly loads run_state before entering run

invariants_checked.notes: Dispatches LOAD_PROFILE to MerlinStore. Returns ok:true on success, falls back to UI otherwise.

LOAD_PROFILE only calls save_system.load_profile() which restores state['meta'] only. state['run'] (life_essence, cards_played, mission, day, oghams, etc.) is NOT restored. An in-progress run (cards, life, etc.) is silently lost.
grep for 'LOAD_RUN' in merlin_store.gd: no matches. No LOAD_RUN_STATE action exists in dispatcher.

invariants_checked.check: save_system.load_run_state() is called somewhere in active path
invariants_checked.notes: load_run_state() only called in game_flow_controller.gd:413 (dead path). Not called in SelectionSauvegarde, HubAntre, TransitionBiome, or BroceliandeForest3D.
Same pattern as _auto_continue: dispatches only LOAD_PROFILE. No run_state restoration.

summary: The Continue flow loads the meta profile (factions, anam, talents) but not the in-progress run state. A player who quits mid-run loses all run progress on Continue. MerlinSaveSystem has load_run_state() and save_run_state() exists and is used, but the restoration path is missing from the active flow.

new_tasks.title: Add LOAD_RUN_STATE action to MerlinStore + call in SelectionSauvegarde Continue
new_tasks.description: 1. Add 'LOAD_RUN_STATE' case to MerlinStore.dispatch(): call save_system.load_run_state(), if non-empty set state['run'] = loaded_run, return ok:true/false. 2. In SelectionSauvegarde._auto_continue() and _on_continue_pressed(), after LOAD_PROFILE succeeds, check save_system.has_run_in_progress() and if true dispatch LOAD_RUN_STATE. 3. If LOAD_RUN_STATE ok:true, set a flag (or use save system) so BroceliandeForest3D knows it can resume the existing run rather than generate a new one. This restores interrupted runs correctly.
